titleStmt.title: SII 34.277: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 277. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the south verandah of the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Seems to record that the araiyas of Pūvarasakuḻi in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu had been in feud as one Araṅguḷattāṉ Īḻattaraiyaṉ had harmed another araiya called Ulagamāṇikkap-paraiyaṉ and that it was now brought to an end by the former agreeing to give some land as compensation for the sear he made to the latter. It was also agreed that they and their progeny should not think ill of each other but remain friendly. If anybody violated this arrangement his land will be confiscated to the temple as a kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna. The settlement was arrived at in the presence of several araiya dignitaries of the locality.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pramāti veruṣam piraṭṭāci mātam 2 10 5 nāḷ Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭu pūvaracakuḻi
Araiya makkaḷil mōkaṉ vāḻvittāṉāṉa Ulaka māṇi
kkap paraiyaṉum cāttaṉ Araṅkuḷattaraiyaṉ Īḻattarai
yaṉum muṉṉāḷilē Eṅkaḷil piṇaṅkukaiyil vāḻvittā
ṉāṉa Ulaka māṇikkapparaiyaṉai Araṅkuḷattāṉ Ī
ḻattaraiyaṉ Ivar kaiyyilē Iṭipaṭ ṭuva
m pukaiyil Intat taḻumpuḷḷatukku kāṉanāṭṭu
tteṟkāṭṭūr vāṇātarayar muṉpākavum
Aṭaikkalavaṉ mūtta cōḻanāṭāḻvāṉ muṉ
pākavum kūttaṉ tuṇṭarāyaṉ muṉpākavum peruṅkō
ḷiyūr Araiyakaḷil cīmāṉ cōḻakōṉ muṉpākavum
nāṉa ciṅka tēvaṉ muṉpākavum va
ṅkaramuṭaiyāṉ makkaḷil cāttaṉ muṉpākavum
Iruṅkōḷan muṉpākavum Ittaḻumpuk kaṇakkuḷḷatu tīr
ntu Araṅkuḷavan Īḻattaraiyaṉ nilamāṉa ceṭṭi va
yakkal vāḻvittāṉ Ulakamāṇikkapparaiyaṟku
cantirādhittavarai kāṇiyāṭcci yāvitākavum muṉ
pum Ivar makkaḷ marumakkaḷukkum tāṉātana vikkiṟayaṅkaḷukku
makkaḷ �kavum Ippaṭi naṭakkum Aḷavukku Intavāḻvi
ttāṉ Ulakamāṇikka paraiyaṉāl Ivaṉ tampit tamaiyaṉāl makkaḷu ma
rumakkaḷāl Ivar Uḷḷuṟṟāral Araṅkuḷavaṉ Īḻattaraiyaṉukkum Ivaṉ tampi
tamaiyamārkkum makkaḷ marumakkaḷukkum Ivaṉ Uḷḷuṟṟārkkum Oru kuṟain
ttu mutal paruki nīṅkkutal ceyyil vāḻvittāṉ Ulakamāṇikkap
paraiyaṉ nilamāṉa taraikkīḻ ceyyilum mīḻattāṉ vayakkallum mokkaṉ
kkivāḻvaṉ Ulakamāṇikka paraiyar kūṟṟāluḷḷatu tiruvaraṉkuḷattu tānat
taṅkaḷāl ttu Uḻutu koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum
Ippakaiyai nōkki Īḻattaraiyaṉ Aḻinta Aḻivum kuṭukka kaṭavēṉākavum
Araṅkuḷavaṉ Īḻattaraiyaṉāl yivaṉ tampit tamaiyaṉāl Ivaṉ makkaḷ marumakkaḷāl Iva
ṉ Uḷḷuṟṟārāl vāḻvaṉ Ulakamāṇikkap paraiyaṉukkum Ivaṉ tampit tamaiyamārkkum
Ivaṉ makkaḷ marumakkaḷukkum Ivar Uḷḷuṟṟārkkum Uḷ kuṟaiceykutal viṉai niṉaikkutal
Ivarkku niṉṟa pakutiyiḻantu vēṟuvaru pakutiy perukutal ceyyil Araṅkuḷavan Īḻattaraiyan
yāṉ rākuttaṉ pakkal yaccaṉ vayakkal ṅkuḷattañceyyil Īḻattaraiyaṉ
rāta Ivaṉ yal makkaḷē kūṟṟāluṭai
ḷ nilam tiruvaraṅkuḷattu tāṉattārum Ūrārum tāṅ
kalum nāṭṭi kuṭi nīṅka ṅka viṟṟu yitu ko
ḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Itu m kuṭukka kaṭavā
ṉākavum Ippaṭi Orunila kum Enṟu naṭattippe
nakaṭavōmmākavum Ippaṭi ttu Eṅkaḷil Icaintuviṭṭōm vāḻvittāṉ Ulakamāṇi
kkap paraiyaṉum Araṅkuḷavan Īḻattaraiyaṉum vāḻ Ulakamāṇikkap paraiyaṉum Araṅkuḷa
van Īḻattaraiyaṉum colli Eḻutinēṉ nāṭṭukka
vāḻvittāṉ Eḻuttu Iṉ nilattāl varu
Digital edition of SII 34.277 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
